rulings.Case Title: DEBRA EDGERLY VS. PHILIP KIELY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 1. DEFENDANTS PHILIP KIELY, FILLMORE PLAZA APARTMENTS' MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted. No allegations of extreme and outrageous conduct are pleaded to support a claim for punitive damages. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: KENDRA TOMCIK DR et al VS. SIDNEY FERNALD DR et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 2. DEFENDANT DR. SIDNEY FERNALD'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN VS. SHANE W. MURPHY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Award Of Atty'S Fees After The Granting Of Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 6. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC'S Motion For Award Of Attorney's Fees After The Granting Of Summary Judgment. A hearing is required. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: MARJORIE DELA CRUZ VS. MIA LUCERO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 7. BRADSHAW AND ASSOCIATES' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANTS VEDASTO LUCERO, MASTUELA LUCERO. Grant if moving party brings a copy of proof of service of the order shortening time to the hearing. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT TIAN XIE'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Second Amended Cross-Complaint is denied. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: TIAN TING XIE VS. HOWARD N. CHUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT TIAN XIE'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is overruled. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: MR RICKEY LEON SCOTT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 11, 2010, line 4. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted. No opposition filed. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: HEPCARE, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al VS. THOMAS CLARKE et al
